data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT_LIGHTWEIGHT: {"version":1,"schema_version":2,"epicId":"3e74-56da","generatedAt":"2026-04-29T20:05:18Z","generatedBy":"preplanning-lightweight","epic":{"title":"Merge-safe ticket IDs and concurrent-edit hardening","successCriteria":["ID entropy floor: ticket-create.sh uses 16 hex chars for new canonical IDs","CLI resolver accepts canonical (8 or 16 hex), alias, jira_key, or unambiguous prefix","Display cascade + dual-output create: ticket create emits human summary + canonical on last line","In-repo pet-alias word list: ~1500 adj + ~1500 nouns, alias cached at creation in CREATE event","Consumer migration: 4 known consumers updated to extract canonical via | tail -1","STATUS parent-chain resolution: parent_status_uuid field, fork detection, lexical tie-break, structured log","Reducer schema bump + grandfathered replay: SNAPSHOT rebuild backfills parent_status_uuid","Transitional legacy-client behavior documented, no enforcement gate","Zero regression: Jira bridge audit committed as 3e74-56da-jira-bridge-audit.md","Integration test concurrency harness: tests/integration/ticket-id-concurrency/","Integration test collision probe: tests/integration/ticket-id-collision/"]},"doneDefinitions":["When this epic is complete, ticket-create.sh generates canonical IDs using 16 hex chars with <10^-15 collision probability at any foreseeable count","When this epic is complete, all ticket CLI commands resolve alias, jira_key, canonical (8 or 16 hex), and unambiguous prefix forms with documented precedence order","When this epic is complete, ticket create emits a human-readable summary line followed by the canonical ID on the last line (scripts extract via | tail -1)","When this epic is complete, plugins/dso/resources/ticket-wordlist.txt provides deterministic adj-noun-noun aliases computed at creation time and stored in CREATE event data.alias","When this epic is complete, the 4 consumer skill files (debug-everything, create-bug, fix-bug, onboarding) extract canonical IDs via | tail -1 and a grep audit log is committed","When this epic is complete, STATUS events carry parent_status_uuid and the reducer resolves forks deterministically via lexical tie-break, emitting PARENT_CHAIN_FORK_RESOLVED structured logs","When this epic is complete, reducer schema_version is bumped and one-shot SNAPSHOT rebuild backfills parent_status_uuid using timestamp-order fallback","When this epic is complete, legacy 8-char ID client behavior during transition is documented in release notes and architecture doc (no enforcement gate)","When this epic is complete, Jira bridge audit is committed as plugins/dso/docs/designs/3e74-56da-jira-bridge-audit.md with confirmed-safe or migrate status per finding","When this epic is complete, tests/integration/ticket-id-concurrency/run.sh asserts zero silent loss and deterministic fork resolution across 10 repeated runs","When this epic is complete, tests/integration/ticket-id-collision/run.sh asserts zero canonical and zero alias collisions across 100,000 generated IDs"],"considerations":["[Testing] Concurrency harness (SC10) requires deterministic replay across 10 runs \u2014 assert-order sensitivity; use stable sort for comparison","[Reliability] SNAPSHOT rebuild is one-shot migration \u2014 DANGLING_PARENT warning path must handle events not present after full replay without crashing reducer","[Maintainability] ticket-lib.sh is shared mutation surface with 2c28-e5b9 (core query layer) and 6f7a-4ba6 (delete subcommand) \u2014 coordinate merge order per coordination notes in epic","[Testing] Collision probe (SC11) generates 100,000 IDs \u2014 needs explicit time/memory resource bounds in run.sh to avoid CI resource exhaustion"],"stories":[],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":0,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":[]},"researchFindings":[]}
